calendar.matters:
Request And Notice Of Hearing Re Confirming Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Sep-29-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PETITIONER LPL FINANCIAL LLC's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Off calendar. Petitioner's notice of hearing (for September 26, 2025) attached no proof of service on respondent Eric Grant Demarcus. Respondent has not appeared in this action. There is no filed proof of service showing that the petition for confirmation was served on respondent. The court notified all counsel who have appeared of the continued hearing date to September 29, 2025 (because September 26 is a court holiday), but the court does not have an email address for respondent's counsel and the court's notification of a continued hearing date cannot cure the moving party's failure to serve the petition or the notice of hearing. (See Code Civ. Proc., section 1290.4.)

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

Request And Notice Of Hearing Re Confirming Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Sep-19-2025 Continued To Sep-29-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court modifies its tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER LPL FINANCIAL LLC Request And Notice Of Hearing Re Confirming Arbitration Award

Continued to September 29, 2025 on the Court's own motion. Plaintiff's request for continuance to September 26, 2025 was accepted by efiling on September 5,2025. September 26, 2025 is a court holiday. Notice of the change of the continuance date is provided by email to counsel.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
